chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.3097 of 2025 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz ul Hassan Shah Applicant:- Sanam Khan through M/s. Khair Muhammad and Habibur Rehman Khan, Advocates. Respondent:- The State through Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Additional Prosecutor General. Date of hearing:- 08.12.2025 O R D E R =============== MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: A team of P.S. Quaidabad arrested co- accused Adnan on 26.09.2025 from Mehran Highway Road near Khyber Gate, Sherpao Colony, Quaidabad, Landhi, Karachi and from him allegedly 515 gram of Charas was recovered. During investigation he disclosed that the Charas was given to him by present applicant for sale. Hence, he was booked in this case. 2. Except statement of co-accused, prima facie, no other evidence has been found against the applicant, whose counsel has argued that he has got enmity with police and had filed C.P. No.D-4824/2025 and C.P. No.S-1169/2025 before this Court seeking protection. 3. On the other hand, Learned DPG has opposed bail but has not been able to controvert that name of the applicant in this case has been introduced on the statement of co-accused. The admissibility of which is yet to be determined and the false implication of the applicant cannot be ruled out. 4. In view of above, the case for bail is made out and bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant vide order dated 10.11.2025 is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. 5. The Bail Application is disposed of accordingly. The observations herein above are tentative in nature and shall not affect the case of either party on merits before the trial Court.

The Bail Application is disposed of accordingly. The observations herein above are tentative in nature and shall not affect the case of either party on merits before the trial Court. JUDGE hanif JUDGE
